mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_coupon (id, template_id, user_id, username, nickname, phone, coupon_name, coupon_type, threshold_amount, discount_amount, discount_rate, source_type, status, received_time, valid_from, valid_to, used_time, order_id, grant_task_id, available_weekdays, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.templateId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.username}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.phone}, #{item.couponName}, #{item.couponType}, #{item.thresholdAmount}, #{item.discountAmount}, #{item.discountRate}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.status}, #{item.receivedTime}, #{item.validFrom}, #{item.validTo}, #{item.usedTime}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.grantTaskId}, #{item.availableWeekdays}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted} )
